registry_invariants: GitHub state, publication, CI, evaluator output, runtime behavior, implementation availability, conformance results, and elapsed time do not perform a lifecycle transition
every permitted material transition requires an exact-candidate-bound human disposition
emergency restriction uses an Emergency Constraint Notice and does not create an undocumented lifecycle jump
rejected is terminal for the exact candidate but not necessarily for the topic or a future successor candidate
withdrawal preserves historical identity and prior normative force during its valid period

minimum_exit_conditions: exact human disposition is recorded
candidate identity and constraints are bound
transition_rules.migration_effects: none unless explicitly declared by the disposition
transition_rules.conformance_claim_effects: candidate status creates no conformance claim
transition_rules.dependency_effects: candidate status creates no downstream implementation or deployment authority
transition_rules.reversibility: not automatic; a later state change requires another applicable transition rule

required_candidate_identity: same exact candidate or explicit successor candidate
transition_rules.required_unresolved_input_state: constraints and private dependencies recorded; no blocking contradiction
minimum_entry_conditions: constraints and private dependencies are recorded
minimum_exit_conditions: limited normative use, if any, is explicitly approved
exact human disposition is recorded
transition_rules.migration_effects: must be declared when the provisional use affects existing dependencies
transition_rules.conformance_claim_effects: provisional status does not establish stable conformance
transition_rules.dependency_effects: limited use is bounded by the exact disposition and recorded constraints
transition_rules.reversibility: not automatic; a later state change requires another applicable transition rule

transition_rules.required_unresolved_input_state: mandatory contradictions resolved and remaining inputs explicitly bounded

transition_rules.dependency_effects: accepted status does not authorize implementation, release, deployment, or institutional adoption
transition_rules.reversibility: not automatic; a later state change requires another applicable transition rule
